name: hierarchy-traversal-risk
description: Deep team hierarchies could cause performance issues in permission resolution. Each permission check may need to traverse from App up through nested Teams to Organization. Computed views re-evaluate on every access.
recommendation: Consider: 1) Limit hierarchy depth (e.g., max 5 levels), 2) Cache resolved permissions on Membership, 3) Use volatile state for permission cache with invalidation on hierarchy changes.
